documents.text: TeachClaw routes teacher requests into worksheets, lesson decks, marking support, feedback, and generated classroom documents.
OpenClaw validation lanes check routing, memory boundaries, artifact behavior, tool discipline, readiness gates, and guarded live smoke evidence.
The AI Deployment Gateway demonstrates FastAPI schemas, SQLite persistence, API-key write protection, audit events, metrics, readiness checks, Docker, and CI.

deployment.name: TeachClaw
deployment.rollback_plan: Revert to last validated route bundle and rerun gateway smoke tests.
risk_notes: Artifact contracts can drift across runtime layers.
Readiness requires eval evidence plus human judgement for generated teaching quality.
